channel.title: Linux on The Gamer's Hollow
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on The Gamer's Hollow
channel.copyright: ©2023 The Gamer's Hollow | Hero Image by Lorenzo Herrera on Unsplash

item.title: Arch Linux Install Guide
item.description:
A usefull guide for installing arch linux using the command-line.

Overview

Arch Linux is a linux distro that a lot of people say is too hard to install because you have to do everything yourself, but as arch linux has grown the user base has as well and with that, it has become more simple to install.

This guide is aimed at helping you install arch linux on your device. Let’s get to the installation.

item.title: Using a 13 Year Old Laptop With Linux
item.description:
I use a early 2011 Macbook Pro as my daily driver laptop, and it works for what I do, but it could be better. In this post I will overview the pros and cons of using this as my daily driver.

Pros

  • Good battery life
  • Can use modern apps
  • Has relatively good performance

Cons

  • High temperature when doing normal tasks
  • Can’t run modern games in high quality

Why

I use this as my daily driver laptop because it had good battery life, and is an intel based Mac that still supports old versions of Mac OS.

item.title: Using Linux as a Daily Driver
item.description:
Linux, lot’s of people use linux as their daily driver OS and I do as well, I use Linux Mint 22 as my daily drive OS in 2024 because it’s simple and easy to manage. I also use Linux because I have freedom of customization and installing anything I want to tweak the operating system as a whole.

Why I Switched

I switched to Linux because I found it to be more open and inviting for the tweaks I wanted to make, Mac OS was very limited in what I could customize and do because of it’s secure nature in addition to that i’m using an old Macbook Pro from early 2011 as my daily driver laptop so the latest versions of Mac OS won’t run on my laptop so that was another reason for me to switch to linux.
